about
artifacts
play

I'm an engineer, researcher, and creative technologist who strives to build tools that feel like magic.

I'm currently pursuing a master's at Stanford University, where I'm working on human-robot interaction at the ILIAD Lab, advised by professor Dorsa Sadigh.

In the past, I've
  • created interactive robot installations at Refik Anadol Studio, the Exploratorium, and the Stanford Robotics Center
  • conducted research in human-AI interaction at UC Berkeley, advised by Anca Dragan in the InterACT Lab
  • worked on perception for robots at Google X and for autonomous vehicles at Ford Greenfield Labs

If any of this catches your eye, let's chat :)
